prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cinematic fantasy illustration of Rei, a lone elegant young male adventurer seen from behind, standing on a mossy forest path and looking toward an enchanted tree-stump cottage. He has long tousled blond hair, pale skin, a slim athletic build, bare arms, and wears a dark sleeveless fantasy outfit with leather straps crossing his back, black gloves or arm guards, a belted waist with small pouches, fitted dark trousers, sturdy dark sandals or open fantasy footwear, and a long asymmetrical black cloak or sash with subtle purple lining and gold trim trailing in the breeze. The setting is an ancient woodland at golden hour: towering trees, dense foliage, ferns, moss-covered stones, exposed roots, and a narrow wet stone path with tiny reflections. The cottage is built into a massive hollow tree stump on the right side of the composition, covered in ivy, vines, moss, and leafy growth; it has exactly four warm glowing visible windows: one small round window high above the door, one arched window to the left of the door, one arched window to the right, and one tiny diamond-paned window set into the wooden door. Include a rounded wooden front door with carved trim, a small hanging lantern glowing above it, shallow stone steps, and whimsical handcrafted details that make the home feel inhabited. Use dramatic backlighting with sunbeams filtering through the forest canopy from the upper left, warm amber window light, soft atmospheric haze, deep green shadows, highly detailed bark texture, painterly-realistic anime fantasy rendering, rich contrast, magical quiet mood, no text, no border, no watermark.
